name: The Tax Collector of Armageddon
text:
Flying, deathtouch
Whenever an opponent draws a card outside their draw step, they pay {1} or you put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock and they lose 1 life. The end is coming; he still wants his cut.
{2}{B}, Remove four doom counters from the Doomsday Clock: Each opponent discards their hand and loses 4 life. Account settled.
flavorText: "There are two certainties. I am both of them."
